calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-03-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Maureen Howard.
Clifford Wang, Esq. for Petitioners: YeXian Xue and WeiAun Zhao, are present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: JinYuan Zhao.
Mr. Wang is also serve as a Cantonese Interpreter.
Petitioners and Interpreter were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name of the minor were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Justin JinYuan Zhao.
Decree signed in open court.
